summary: M447 — Restored party-frame bottom strip; fixed canvas overlap. M446's panel-strip was the wrong fix — the user wanted the party frames KEPT, just not overlapping the canvas's bottom row. Reverted M446's .ev-hud chrome strip and the .ev-mobile-portrait-strip hide. Real fix: the canvas's groundY is now computed ABOVE the live .ev-hud height each frame (canvas.height/rect.height conversion + 6px breathing room, clamped to ≥40% sky band), so the front row of sprites clears the bottom panel cleanly instead of rendering behind it.
